---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new feature or product capability
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem

<!-- What is the user pain point? Is this blocking any customers or
     internal work? -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- Describe the behaviour you want. Mockups, diagrams, and references
     to comparable products are welcome. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What other approaches did you consider, and why is the proposed
     one preferred? -->

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] <!-- Behavioural outcome 1 -->
- [ ] <!-- Behavioural outcome 2 -->
- [ ] <!-- Behavioural outcome 3 -->

## Out of scope

<!-- What is explicitly NOT part of this feature? -->

## Priority

- [ ] Must have (blocker for current release)
- [ ] Should have (this quarter)
- [ ] Nice to have (this year)
- [ ] Exploratory (no commitment)

## Dependencies

<!-- Does this depend on any in-flight work, third-party services, or
     a design decision that needs an ADR? -->
